title: osmorhiza intermedia
intro: Osmorhiza intermedia, also known as intermediate sweet cicely or sweet cicely, is a perennial plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Osmorhiza intermedia include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Osmorhiza intermedia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal properties, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its benefits.
